Philadelphia.description: The historic streets of Philly feel unusually quiet. Someone saw a slick-haired thief speeding away from Independence Hall.

witnesses.clue_text: He was converting his cash to British Pounds. Kept boasting about outrunning Big Ben.
witnesses.failed_text: I don't talk to broke detectives. Bring cash.

witnesses.clue_text: He asked for a map of the River Thames and mentioned he was in town for a tennis match.
witnesses.failed_text: Pardon me, but I only discuss hotel guests with polite, charming individuals.

London.description: Fog rolls over the Thames. The local constabulary confirms a mysterious traveler matching Vinnie's slick look arrived on a flight.

witnesses.clue_text: He was asking about ancient Egyptian hieroglyphics. Said he was heading to Cairo next.
witnesses.failed_text: You don't intimidate me. Get out of my museum!

witnesses.clue_text: I dropped him off near a flight heading to the Nile. I noticed a massive gold ring on his pinky finger.
witnesses.failed_text: Gas ain't free, pal. No money, no talk.

Cairo.description: The heat rises off the desert sands. You track the footprints right to the base of the Great Pyramid...

witnesses.clue_text: I saw him! He was carrying a massive bronze bell wrapped in a blanket. Go get him, Lacy!
witnesses.failed_text: I don't know who you are. Go away!
